'''longamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xanthogranulomatous|xanthogranulomatous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xanthogranulomatous|xanthogranulomatous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| longamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:longamithi|longamithi]] || [[word:longamiji|longamiji]] || [[word:longamishi|longamishi]] || [[word:longamiki|longamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:longamuthuthu|longamuthuthu]] || [[word:longamujuju|longamujuju]] || [[word:longamushushu|longamushushu]] || [[word:longamukuku|longamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:longamuthu|longamuthu]] || [[word:longamuju|longamuju]] || [[word:longamushu|longamushu]] || [[word:longamuku|longamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:longamufthuf|longamufthuf]] || [[word:longamufjuf|longamufjuf]] || [[word:longamufshuf|longamufshuf]] || [[word:longamufkuf|longamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:longamethe|longamethe]] || [[word:longameje|longameje]] || [[word:longameshe|longameshe]] || [[word:longameke|longameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:longamothotho|longamothotho]] || [[word:longamojojo|longamojojo]] || [[word:longamoshosho|longamoshosho]] || [[word:longamokoko|longamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:longamotho|longamotho]] || [[word:longamojo|longamojo]] || [[word:longamosho|longamosho]] || [[word:longamoko|longamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:longamofthof|longamofthof]] || [[word:longamofjof|longamofjof]] || [[word:longamofshof|longamofshof]] || [[word:longamofkof|longamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:longamĂŻfthĂŻf|longamĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:longamĂŻfjĂŻf|longamĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:longamĂŻfshĂŻf|longamĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:longamĂŻfkĂŻf|longamĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:longamĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|longamĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:longamĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|longamĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:longamĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|longamĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:longamĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|longamĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:longamĂŻfthĂŻf|longamĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:longamĂŻfjĂŻf|longamĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:longamĂŻfshĂŻf|longamĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:longamĂŻfkĂŻf|longamĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:longamĂŻfthĂŻf|longamĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:longamĂŻfjĂŻf|longamĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:longamĂŻfshĂŻf|longamĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:longamĂŻfkĂŻf|longamĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:longamĂŠthĂŠ|longamĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:longamĂŠjĂŠ|longamĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:longamĂŠshĂŠ|longamĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:longamĂŠkĂŠ|longamĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:longamathatha|longamathatha]] || [[word:longamajaja|longamajaja]] || [[word:longamashasha|longamashasha]] || [[word:longamakaka|longamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:longamatha|longamatha]] || [[word:longamaja|longamaja]] || [[word:longamasha|longamasha]] || [[word:longamaka|longamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:longamafthaf|longamafthaf]] || [[word:longamafjaf|longamafjaf]] || [[word:longamafshaf|longamafshaf]] || [[word:longamafkaf|longamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:longamasha|longamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:longamshĂ«asha|longamshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:longamroasha|longamroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:longammuasha|longammuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:longamyaasha|longamyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golongamnkshĂ«asha|golongamnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golongamnkroasha|golongamnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golongamnkmuasha|golongamnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golongamnkyaasha|golongamnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:longangamasha|longangamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:longangamshĂ«asha|longangamshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:longangamroasha|longangamroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:longangammuasha|longangammuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:longangamyaasha|longangamyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golongangamnkshĂ«asha|golongangamnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golongangamnkroasha|golongangamnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golongangamnkmuasha|golongangamnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golongangamnkyaasha|golongangamnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lengĂŠmasha|lengĂŠmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lengĂŠmshĂ«asha|lengĂŠmshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lengĂŠmroasha|lengĂŠmroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lengĂŠmmuasha|lengĂŠmmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lengĂŠmyaasha|lengĂŠmyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golengĂŠmnkshĂ«asha|golengĂŠmnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golengĂŠmnkroasha|golengĂŠmnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golengĂŠmnkmuasha|golengĂŠmnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golengĂŠmnkyaasha|golengĂŠmnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:longfamasha|longfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:longfamshĂ«asha|longfamshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:longfamroasha|longfamroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:longfammuasha|longfammuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:longfamyaasha|longfamyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golongfamnkshĂ«asha|golongfamnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golongfamnkroasha|golongfamnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golongfamnkmuasha|golongfamnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golongfamnkyaasha|golongfamnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
